steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The study tested ten groups with different cultural backgrounds and found identical odor preferences across all of them. The question asks what the findings undermine.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Addresses a factor the study did not examine. ✗
  • Choice B — Claims that culture significantly shapes odor perception. If that were true, different cultures would show different preferences—but identical preferences across all ten groups directly contradicts this. ✓
  • Choice C — Describes what the study demonstrated rather than what it undermined. ✗
  • Choice D — Misstates the study's implications and addresses factors not examined. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
